betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Moon Turf§f (advancedrocketry:moonturf) is a §6single block§f world-gen block that spawns on the §6Moon§f and other §6low-gravity rocky planets§f in the AR progression. It is a §6regolith block§f with a §6light gray, dusty appearance§f and is the §6signature terrain block§f of any moon-landing mission.

§6Production Path (world generation)§f:
- Source: §6Moon Turf§f is generated by AR's planet dimension system on moons and rocky planets
- It cannot be crafted — it must be §6mined from a moon§f during a landing mission
- Alternative: §6gravel§f (minecraft:gravel) can be processed in the §6NuclearCraft Extractor§f (nuclearcraft_extractor category) to produce a similar block (per JEI cross-mod recipe)
- Drops: 1x §6Moon Turf§f when mined with any pickaxe

The block is §6purely cosmetic§f in its base form but is the §6prerequisite§f for the entire §6alien planet materials§f questline. The quest requires the player to mine a §6Moon Turf§f block and bring it back to the home planet.

This quest is a prerequisite for the §6Hot Turf§f (10074), §6Basalt§f (10075), §6Geode§f (10076), §6Crystals§f (10077), §6Charcoal Log§f (10078), and §6Electric Mushroom§f (10079) — the §67 planet-specific material quests§f that follow. It is the §6first milestone§f of any planetary exploration campaign.

§eTip§f: The first §6Moon Turf§f is the §6hardest§f to obtain because it requires a §6successful moon landing mission§f. Land on the §6near side§f of the moon for the densest regolith deposits. A §6Monopropellant Rocket Engine§f (10026) is sufficient for a one-way moon trip.
